output.code: import json, re, unicodedata, os, sys, math, numpy as np, itertools, difflib

# Load the datasets

with open(quran_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:

len(quran_data), quran_data[0].keys()[:5]

with open(hadith_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:

type(hadith_data), len(hadith_data)

import re, unicodedata

# Arabic diacritics regex
arabic_diacritics = re.compile(r'[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]')
tatweel = '\u0640'

def normalize_ar(s):
    if s is None:
        return ''
    # unify hamza forms: alif with hamza -> alif; ya with hamza -> ya; waw with hamza -> waw; alif maqsura -> ya
    s = s.replace('أ', 'ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا')
    s = s.replace('ى','ي').replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ء','ء')  # keep standalone hamza
    # remove diacritics and tatweel
    s = s.replace(tatweel,'')
    s = arabic_diacritics.sub('', s)
    # remove punctuation (Arabic and general)
    s = re.sub(r'[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]+', ' ', s)  # keep Arabic letters and digits/underscore/whitespace
    # normalize spaces
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip()
    return s

full_span = "فَلْيَنْظُرْ أَيُّهَا أَبْعَدُ مَسَارًا"
snippet = "فَلْيَنْظُ...ُ مَسَارًا"
norm_full_span = normalize_ar(full_span)
norm_snippet = normalize_ar(snippet)
norm_full_span, norm_snippet

# Build normalized version of each ayah for quick search
quran_norm_texts = [normalize_ar(item['ayah_text']) for item in quran_data]

# Search for full span as substring in normalized texts
matches_full = [(i, quran_data[i]['surah_id'], quran_data[i]['ayah_id'], quran_data[i]['ayah_text']) 
                for i, t in enumerate(quran_norm_texts) if norm_full_span in t]

matches_snippet = [(i, quran_data[i]['surah_id'], quran_data[i]['ayah_id'], quran_data[i]['ayah_text']) 
                   for i, t in enumerate(quran_norm_texts) if norm_snippet in t]

len(matches_full), len(matches_snippet)

partial_phrase = normalize_ar("فَلْيَنْظُرْ أَيُّهَا")
matches_partial = [(i, quran_data[i]['surah_id'], quran_data[i]['ayah_id'], quran_data[i]['ayah_text']) 
                for i, t in enumerate(quran_norm_texts) if partial_phrase in t]
len(matches_partial), matches_partial[:5]

orig = full_span
candidate_phrase = "فَلْيَنْظُرْ أَيُّهَا أَزْكَىٰ طَعَامًا"

def lcs_length(a, b):
    # simple DP for LCS length of strings (small strings)
    n, m = len(a), len(b)
    dp = [0]*(m+1)
    for i in range(1, n+1):
        prev = 0
        for j in range(1, m+1):
            temp = dp[j]
            if a[i-1] == b[j-1]:
                dp[j] = prev + 1
            else:
                dp[j] = max(dp[j], dp[j-1])
            prev = temp
    return dp[m]

# Normalize both before LCS?
norm_orig = normalize_ar(orig)
norm_cand = normalize_ar(candidate_phrase)
lcs_norm = lcs_length(norm_orig, norm_cand)
lcs_char_ratio = lcs_norm / max(len(norm_orig), len(norm_cand))
norm_orig, norm_cand, lcs_norm, lcs_char_ratio

start_idx = ayah_18_19.find("فَلْيَنْظُرْ أَيُّهَا")
end_phrase = "طَعَامًا"
end_idx = ayah_18_19.find(end_phrase, start_idx)
start_idx, end_idx, ayah_18_19[start_idx:end_idx+len(end_phrase)]

def char_ngrams(s, n=3):
    s = normalize_ar(s)
    return {s[i:i+n] for i in range(len(s)-n+1)} if len(s)>=n else {s}
def jaccard(a,b):
    inter = a & b
    union = a | b
    return len(inter)/len(union) if union else 0.0
A = char_ngrams(full_span,3)
B = char_ngrams("فَلْيَنْظُرْ أَيُّهَا أَزْكَىٰ طَعَامًا",3)
j = jaccard(A,B)
lcs_norm, j

# Search hadiths for "فلينظر ايها"
norm_partial = normalize_ar("فَلْيَنْظُرْ أَيُّهَا")
hadith_matches = []
for h in hadith_data:
    text = h.get('hadithTxt') or h.get('Matn') or ""
    if norm_partial in normalize_ar(text):
        hadith_matches.append(h)
len(hadith_matches)

cand = ayah_18_19[start_idx:end_idx+len(end_phrase)]
cand, [hex(ord(ch)) for ch in cand]
